security_trigger_reason: Fresh source commit 7b1acee82851 changed protected support incident route error classification after r04; audit freshness required for implementation security scope.

evidence: apps/core/src/platform/operator-api.ts:679 protects support runbooks with F-0024 admission; apps/core/src/platform/operator-api.ts:702 protects incident listing with admission and limit 1..100; apps/core/src/platform/operator-api.ts:734 and :777 parse bounded JSON then require support-operation admission before writes; apps/core/src/platform/operator-api.ts:771 and :815 map durable request_failed to 503, and :773/:817 now return 503 for first-attempt service throws. packages/contracts/src/operator-auth.ts:201 classifies POST/PATCH support incidents as SUPPORT_OPERATION and :265 grants that class only to support_operator among ordinary roles. packages/contracts/src/support.ts:275 and :299 bound request shapes and reject caller-supplied action status/evidence; :403 redacts bearer/basic/operator tokens and secret-like key/value material. apps/core/src/support/support-evidence.ts:199 and :213 redact request content before bundle persistence/hash; :401/:442/:533 resolve canonical evidence via owner readers; :424/:479 claim update request ids before side effects; :456/:551 mark post-claim failures request_failed. apps/core/src/support/support-actions.ts:43 documents human_only without execution; :55 only invokes server-wired owner seams for owner_routed actions and requires returned evidence. packages/db/src/support.ts:261 rejects non-support write surfaces; :620 and :887 use parameterized SQL; :676 and :837 enforce replay conflict/idempotency; :870 blocks unsafe terminal closure. infra/migrations/028_support_incidents.sql:29 stores support-owned incident rows with bounded enums and :101 tracks update request replay state. apps/core/test/platform/operator-support.integration.test.ts:45 covers RBAC and provenance forwarding, :158 covers first service failure 503; apps/core/test/support/support-evidence.contract.test.ts:274/:318/:365/:405/:469 cover replay, post-claim failure, critical closure, and forged action evidence; apps/core/test/support/support-canonical-refs.integration.test.ts:22/:74/:201 cover canonical reporting/release/auth evidence freshness.

notes: Security review PASS for target commit 7b1acee82851. Reviewed support route RBAC/admission, evidence trust boundary, owner-action side effects, idempotency/replay behavior, post-claim failures, first-attempt service error classification, redaction before persistence/hash, incident listing exposure, and F-0024/F-0026 bounded validation. No high-confidence exploitable findings found. Narrow verification run passed: node --experimental-strip-types --experimental-test-module-mocks --test packages/contracts/test/operator-auth.contract.test.ts packages/contracts/test/operator-api.contract.test.ts apps/core/test/platform/operator-support.integration.test.ts apps/core/test/support/support-evidence.contract.test.ts apps/core/test/support/support-canonical-refs.integration.test.ts.
